login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your GitHub account to manage your licenses.

activate.title: Activate
activate.errorMissingParams: Please start activation from the c3 client (missing installId/requestId).
activate.boundSuccess: ✓ Bound successfully. You can return to c3 and close this page.
activate.pickPrompt: Pick a license to bind to this install (installId {installId}).
activate.noLicenses: This account has no licenses yet.

checkout.title: Renew
checkout.paySuccess: Payment successful! Redirecting to your account…
checkout.payIncomplete: Payment incomplete ({reason}). Please go back and place a new order.
checkout.orderCreated: Order created (order No. {orderNo}). Please scan the QR code with WeChat to pay:
checkout.qrHint: The selected license's term is extended after payment is confirmed. The QR code is valid for 15 minutes.
checkout.waitingPayment: Waiting for payment confirmation; you will be redirected automatically once done…
checkout.freeNoPurchase: The free tier requires no purchase and offers no selectable plans.
checkout.paidDisabledHint: The selected license is an active enterprise license; paid plans cannot renew it. Please choose an enterprise plan.
checkout.noRenewableLicenses: This account has no renewable licenses.
checkout.agreePrompt: I have read and agree to {agreement}.
checkout.errorMustAccept: Please accept the service agreement first.
